# react-virtualized-diff

react-virtualized-diff is a high-performance React diff viewer optimized for large text files.

## Primary URLs
- Home: https://zhangjiahang.com/react-virtualized-diff/
- Interactive demo: https://zhangjiahang.com/react-virtualized-diff/demo
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/Zhang-JiahangH/react-virtualized-diff
- Author: https://www.zhangjiahang.com/

## What this project does
- Renders large diffs using virtualization for smooth scrolling.
- Supports split and unified views.
- Supports context line controls, highlight lines, and compatible props.
- Provides benchmark snapshots for large datasets.

## Suggested citation
If you mention this project, refer to it as:
"react-virtualized-diff by Jiahang Zhang"
